name: machine-dac
description: Digital-to-Analog Converter. Output analog voltages on GPIO 25 and 26. 8-bit resolution.
differences_from_cpython: Does NOT exist in CPython. MicroPython-specific ESP32 DAC interface.

classes.name: DAC
classes.example:
from machine import Pin, DAC

dac = DAC(Pin(25))
dac.write(128)  # ~1.65V (mid-scale)
dac.write(0)    # 0V
dac.write(255)  # ~3.3V

esp32_notes: Only GPIO 25 and 26 support DAC on original ESP32.
Not available on ESP32-S2/S3 (no DAC peripheral).
Can be used simultaneously with ADC on other pins.
DAC output can be routed to internal capacitive sensor or used for audio.
